title: RINL is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: RINL is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, RINL in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
